name: Summon Fey

placementEligibility.notes: Summon Fey manifests the Fey Spirit in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range.

effects.description: Summon one Fey Spirit in a visible unoccupied space within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with concentration, choosing a Mirthful, Joyful, or Tricksy mood. The spirit is an ally, shares your Initiative count but acts immediately after you, obeys verbal commands with no action required, Dodges and avoids danger when uncommanded, disappears at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends, and uses the slot level for AC, Hit Points, Fey Step teleport, and Fey Aura damage.

scaling.customFormula: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Fey Spirit stat block: AC is 12 + spell level, HP is 30 + 10 for each spell level above 3, and Fey Aura damage is 2d6 + 3 + spell level.

conditionalEndings.description: The fey spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summon.objectDescription: Fey Spirit ally that shares the caster's initiative, acts immediately after the caster, obeys verbal commands with no caster action, and uses Fey Aura as its combat action.

specialActions.name: Fey Aura
specialActions.description: Melee or Ranged spell attack, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 2d6 + 4 + the spell's level Psychic damage, and on a Mirthful or Tricksy spirit the target is also affected by the mood rider.

socialEffect.notes: The summoned Fey Spirit is an ally to the caster and allies, understands the caster languages, shares initiative, and follows commands.

aiContext.prompt: Choose the Fey Spirit mood (Mirthful, Joyful, or Tricksy) and arrival space; use the caster's spell attack modifier for Fey Aura and apply the chosen mood rider on a hit.

options.label: Mirthful
options.summary: Summon a Mirthful Fey Spirit that can charm a creature it hits with Fey Aura.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fey Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Joyful
options.summary: Summon a Joyful Fey Spirit that can teleport an ally with its Fey Step.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fey Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Tricksy
options.summary: Summon a Tricksy Fey Spirit that can frighten a creature it hits with Fey Aura.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Fey Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

modeChoice.notes: The mood choice selects the Fey Aura rider that the summoned spirit applies.

description: You call forth a fey spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the Fey Spirit stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a mood: Mirthful, Joyful, or Tricksy. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block. The Fey Spirit's AC, Hit Points, and Fey Aura damage increase as the spell's level increases.
